You can easily make beautiful garnishes by using fresh fruits and vegetables. Use a sharp paring knife to shape them into flowers. title: Oreo Ice cream Cake
intro: One of the desserts that just belongs on the table at simply all of your family gatherings favorite is ice cream. Ice cream is eaten in every season but especially during the summer, it becomes heart favorite. It is also very versatile. You can give it a new shape to surprise your family. I made it ...

content.content:
Crush half Oreo cookies.
Take out ice cream in a bowl; add half crushed Oreo cookies in ice cream to mix well.

Line up a 9 inches cake pan or some mold with fine plastic sheet.
Set whole Oreo cookies on all the side of mold or pan.

Now add ice cream mixture in pan and level it.
Spread crushed cookies on top.
Keep in freezer at least 6 hours or until set.
Carefully unlock cake pan to bring out ice cream cake or if you are using some simple mold, pull out plastic sheet carefully.
Set in serving plate and serve.

content.content: Cut the onion in half crosswise, and cut out 3/4-inch triangles all the way around the edge.
Trim 1/4 inch off the bottom of the onion half and separate out the layers. The inner layers will have blunt ends, so further trimming will be needed to get the pointy ends.

title: How to Get Rid of Garlic Smell from Hands
intro: How to Get Rid of Garlic Smell from Hands Garlic is a staple ingredient in many recipes and it leaves the worst smell on hands. After peeling the garlic the first thing we want is to get rid of the garlic smell from our hands. These are my tried and tested tips that I use to get off the smell. Musta...

content.content: How to Get Rid of Garlic Smell from Hands

Garlic is a staple ingredient in many recipes and it leaves the worst smell on hands. After peeling the garlic the first thing we want is to get rid of the garlic smell from our hands. These are my tried and tested tips that I use to get off the smell.
Apply mustard oil on your hands and rub gently and leave for 5 minutes then wash hands with soap. The smell will off from your hands.
A combination of lemon and salt also works the best. Mix small amount of salt and lemon and rub on hands. Wash hands after 2 minutes.
This trick is not suitable if you have sensitive skin or you have some cut. So be careful while applying the second tip. Other wise mustard oil tip is best.

title: How to Store the Fish
intro: If you want to store the fish for more than a day then follow this easy and tested tip to keep the fish fresh. How to Properly Store Fish Make a solution by mixing salt, turmeric, and a dash of vinegar. Apply this on fish, place in zip lock bag or wrap in aluminum foil, wax paper, or plastic wr...

content.content: If you want to store the fish for more than a day then follow this easy and tested tip to keep the fish fresh.
Make a solution by mixing salt, turmeric, and a dash of vinegar. Apply this on fish, place in zip lock bag or wrap in aluminum foil, wax paper, or plastic wrap and freeze it.
Before using thaw the fish and cook. You will not get any bad odor.

title: Home Remedy for Hand Burn
intro: Sometimes while cooking hands burns due to steam or hot oil dropping that is very painful and it also makes blisters and leaves a spot on the skin. I often suffer from this problem especially my no baking is complete without touching a hand to a hot oven. How much painful this is I know very well. :...

content.content: Sometimes while cooking hands burns due to steam or hot oil dropping that is very painful and it also makes blisters and leaves a spot on the skin.
I often suffer from this problem especially my no baking is complete without touching a hand to a hot oven.  How much painful this is I know very well. :(
Previous days I was making caramel sauce, I touched the sauce with fingertip as I thought it would be a little bit cool now but horrible, it was too much hot.

I quickly took out the solution from the fridge that I made a few days back and applied it on the affected part and thanks I felt relief from the pain. I got this remedy for a magazine and now sharing it with you.
If the hand burns with oil and leaves a dark spot. Apply glycerin on spot daily. Regular use will eliminate the dark spot.
For more tips visit: Tips and Tricks

title: How Keep Curry Color Brownish
intro: How Keep Curry Color Brownish As everyone knows the use of too much oil is not good for health and it leads to some serious diseases. That’s why women add less oil but it does not give a vibrant color to the curry. Here is the solution to this problem, by following this trick you can keep the curry ...

content.content: As everyone knows the use of too much oil is not good for health and it leads to some serious diseases. That’s why women add less oil but it does not give a vibrant color to the curry. Here is the solution to this problem, by following this trick you can keep the curry color brownish.
When curry gets ready add 2-3 ice cubes in it and keep it on dum. After a few minutes, all fats will come on top, remove them with a spoon. This trick will not change the color of curry.

title: How Remove Smell from Flask
intro: Tips to Remove Smell from Flask Mostly people keep tea and coffee in a thermos or flask which starts giving a particular smell. So naturally if the same is the case with you then you definitely want to remove the smell from the flask instead of throwing it. Removing smell is easy with the natur...

content.content: Mostly people keep tea and coffee in a thermos or flask which starts giving a particular smell. So naturally if the same is the case with you then you definitely want to remove the smell from the flask instead of throwing it.
Removing smell is easy with the natural available ingredients. Follow one of the below tips.

Mix 2-3 tbsp fresh yogurt and a pinch of salt in a small bowl then put this yogurt in thermos or flask and shake the flask so it coat eventually the inner glass (you can increase yogurt quantity according to flask size). Let stand it for 5 minutes then wash it with dish wash.

Bicarbonate of soda also works well in getting rid of thermos smell. Add 3 tsp of Bicarbonate of soda in flask or thermos then fill up with boiling water and leave for 1 hour. After that rinse it. This trick will remove odor.
This tip is also good in removing stains from flask.
Fill flask with boiling water then add ½ cup lemon juice and leave over night. Next day clean it.

title: How Keep Bread Crumbs on Potato Cutlets
intro: When we fry potato cutlets often bread crumbs separate and spread in a frying pan. Here are three tricks that will help you to Keep Bread Crumbs on Potato Cutlets. Tricks to Keep Bread Crumbs on Potato Cutlets Solution for this problem is, when you make potato cutlets before frying keep them in...

content.content: Tricks to Keep Bread Crumbs on Potato Cutlets
When we fry potato cutlets often bread crumbs separate and spread in a frying pan. Here are three tricks that will help you to Keep Bread Crumbs on Potato Cutlets.

Solution for this problem is, when you make potato cutlets before frying keep them in refrigerate for 30 minutes. Then take them out and lightly press cutlets on palm. Now fry in warm oil. Now you will easily fry and it will not mess up in oil.

Another tip is first coat cutlets in plain flour, shake off excess flour; then dip in beaten egg and finally coat with bread crumbs. Lay cutlets on plate and keep in refrigerate for at least 30 minutes. This gives the breading time to sort of 'dry' and better adhere to the meat.
Make sure oil is hot enough that cook the outer layer quickly and makes it crispy so it does not fall off.

title: How to Avoid Lentils from Insects and Bugs

This is a simple trick that you can follow to avoid lentils from insects and bugs and keep lentils clean. Get Rid of Insects and Bugs from Lentil Keep lentils/splits in a jar and drop a few drops pf oil and place...

content.content: Get Rid of Insects and Bugs from Lentil
Bugs and insects are a big problem in lentils and grains, especially in raining season. This is a simple trick that you can follow to avoid lentils from insects and bugs and keep lentils clean.
Keep lentils/splits in a jar and drop a few drops pf oil and place a bay leave in jar. It will avoid creating insects in lentils.

title: How to Make Bread Crumbs
intro: Bread crumbs are essential for many fried recipes. Do you know you can easily make bread crumbs at home? Read how to make bread crumbs  at home. How to Make Bread Crumbs in Microwave Put bread slices in the microwave and run them for 1-2 minutes. Let keep bread slices in the microwave for 10 mi...

content.content: How to Make Bread Crumbs in Microwave
Bread crumbs are essential for many fried recipes. Do you know you can easily make bread crumbs at home? Read how to make bread crumbs at home.

Put bread slices in the microwave and run them for 1-2 minutes. Let keep bread slices in the microwave for 10 minutes or until hard then take them out. You will notice bread will be hard and you can make crumbs easily.
For Oven, put in the oven for 10 minutes or until brown then rest it for 10 more minutes to cool and harden. Put in food processor and process.

If you do not have a food processor to grind bread then take two hard pieces of bread and rub them on a plate. Rub, rub, and rub. Turn out the side and rub. You will look at crumbs in a plate along with some small and large bread pieces. Put those bread pieces and rub. Your all bread slice will turn into crumbs.
